name: m3ter
description: m3ter — Usage-based billing infrastructure for high-volume SaaS with real-time metering, pricing engine, and billing statement generation.

seo.title: m3ter — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: m3ter: m3ter — Usage-based billing infrastructure for high-volume SaaS with real-time metering, pricing engine, and billing statement generation.

when_to_use: Real-time usage metering for API-based SaaS billing at high volume
Pricing engine handling complex usage + seat hybrid billing configurations
Metered billing statement generation integrated with Stripe or Chargebee
Usage-based billing infrastructure for usage-intensive developer tools

pros: Flexible pricing engine handles complex models
Integrates with Stripe, Salesforce, and Netsuite
Strong investor backing and enterprise traction
cons: Does not replace full billing stack; needs pairing
Enterprise sales motion; no self-serve signup
Pricing is opaque and aimed at larger contracts
Implementation still requires meaningful engineering effort
review.verdict: Best-in-class metering infrastructure for AI and high-volume SaaS, but you still need a billing system around it.
review.best_for: AI and infrastructure SaaS with high-cardinality usage needing a dedicated metering layer.
review.not_for: Simple flat-rate SaaS or teams wanting one tool that covers billing end to end.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
